posts.author: alimongelli (AJ Limongelli)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

One feature that I think would be beneficial is the ability to create a folder where you can organize all the Custom Recipe Automations. We have a grouping of custom recipe automations that we may use per board per project. It would be nice to group those recipes into namable folders so we are not scrolling through massive list of custom recipes.

Any consideration would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you,

AJ
